title: Hotarubi no Mori e
posterAlt: Hotarubi no Mori e (2011) movie poster
tmdbOverview: One hot summer day a little girl gets lost in an enchanted forest of the mountain god where spirits reside. A young boy appears before her, but she cannot touch him for fear of making him disappear. And so a wondrous adventure awaits...
synopsis: Hotarubi no Mori e is a 2011 romance, animation and fantasy film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a G certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
